notes: Seeded from all city runs through April 2026. Add new publications after each city run. last_verified = date URL was confirmed accessible in a pipeline run.

primary_en.notes: Long-term resident blogger. Two articles used in v6 run (Feb 2026 + Sept 2025). High yield, broad neighbourhood coverage. Confirmed active 2026.
EN-language Barcelona-focused publication. Two articles used in v6 run (Torrents EN + Ribot ES). Same publisher, different language editions — count as one publisher for concentration check.
Barcelona-based food writer. Dec 2024 article (open_status_check flag applies). High quality, neighbourhood-specific coverage.
Skews heavily toward Asian restaurants in Eixample. Narrow editorial focus — use with awareness of this bias. Confirmed active Jan 2026.
Secondary source. Good for cross-validation. Use Hit List URL (May 2025), not main guide (published 2022). Pattern: always verify article date from fetched text.

primary_es.notes: ⚠ COI: Repsol operates restaurant guides commercially. Flag all entries with ⚠ coi. JS-rendered — Jina fetch may fail; try article URL directly. High quality when accessible.
Barcelona-focused ES food writer. Dec 2024 articles (open_status_check applies). Good Sant Andreu neighbourhood coverage — underrepresented area.
ES-language Barcelona guide. Dec 2024 article. Confirmed active.

Secondary source. Quotes consistently under 15 words — only useful for cross-validation, not as primary. CA and EN editions are same-publisher — count all Time Out Barcelona editions as one secondary source.

primary_ca.notes: Catalan public broadcaster food section. Slow Food Barcelona guide is a key annual source. Critical for CA-language both-pool signal. Confirmed active Nov 2025.
Major Catalan newspaper food section. Confirmed accessible Mar 2025. Named author required — check byline before accepting.
Was returning 403 in QA audit (Apr 2026) but fetched successfully in v6 run (Apr 2026). Treat as intermittently accessible. Try direct article URL.

known_problematic.reason: CMS 'updated' dates are unreliable — article content may be years old. Always verify article date from fetched text, not metadata.

primary_en.notes: 2025-08-01 article. Good coverage, skews casual/tapas. Confirmed accessible.
Professional food writer (WSET Level 3, Guardian/NYT contributor). Visitor perspective not local. High character count (38,847 chars) — most detailed EN source in v3 run. Nov 2025.

primary_es.notes: Michelin-starred restaurants only — skews high-end, limited dataset diversity. Feb 2026. Useful for fine dining tier.
Valencia-focused ES food writer. Feb 2025. Good mid-range coverage.
Strong local ES source. Filter to Valencian/Spanish/Mediterranean food only — covers many cuisine types. Updated Jul 2025 but underlying content may be older.
⚠ Regional not city — covers Comunitat Valenciana. 5 of 10 entries in v3 run were outside Valencia city. Apply geographic filter strictly.
No named individual author — editorial team credit. Check whether named author rule applies or treat as borderline.
Longest-running local city guide (est. 2000). Strong ES local source. No named individual author — same caveat as Gastroagencia.

known_problematic.reason: Paywall — HTTP 400 in all runs. Main local Valencia newspaper. Worth retrying with direct article URL.
Paywall — HTTP 400 in all runs. Second major local Valencia newspaper. Worth retrying.
Blocked from crawling in all runs. Direct Jina fetch worth retrying — URL is known.
Listed as 'updated October 2025' but fetched content dated August 2017. Do not use — article content is not from 2025.

primary_en.notes: Secondary. Strong cross-validation signal but same publisher as Time Out PT — count as one publisher. Multiple qualifying articles in 2025-2026.
EN-language Lisbon food guide. Strategy A source.

primary_pt.notes: ⚠ Most important independent PT food critic. Was NOT found by Strategy A searches — only by Strategy C direct fetch. Always include as Phase 0 direct fetch for Lisbon runs.
PT food section. Strategy C Phase 0 source. Named author required.
PT lifestyle magazine food section. Strategy B source.

known_problematic.reason: 3 of the 5 sources in the official Lisbon pack were inaccessible as of April 2026 QA audit. Lisbon v2 should find alternative URLs or replacement sources.

primary_en.notes: EN food blogger covering Fes. Primary source in v4 run. 2025 article.
UK food publication. 2025 Fes feature. Visitor perspective.

primary_fr.notes: FR Morocco travel blog. High yield but hit concentration cap (7 entries removed). Use with concentration cap in mind.

known_problematic.reason: Structural gap confirmed — accessible Arabic food writing about specific Fes restaurants does not exist in a form the pipeline can reach. Hespress returned political content. Goud.ma gastronomie returned 404. 8 additional targeted searches found nothing. Requires direct writer relationships, not pipeline automation.

primary_en.notes: Long-term Moroccan resident writer. Best local EN voice in the pack. High quality, specific dish detail.
Secondary. 5 of 8 EN-only entries in v5 run came from here — above ideal concentration. Cap to 30% of EN pool.

primary_fr.notes: French travel writer. Visitor perspective (not Moroccan resident). Good detail.
French writer covering luxury Morocco. Skews high-end.
French lifestyle blogger. Morocco coverage includes Marrakesh restaurants.

primary_en.notes: 10-year Chefchaouen-specific local guide. Closest to a local voice in the pack. 2025. Anonymous editorial — borderline named-author rule.
EN travel blogger. Morocco-resident. 2025 Chefchaouen piece.

known_problematic.publication: Anonymous sources S2 and S3 (original pack)
known_problematic.reason: 5 restaurants removed April 2026 — sourced from anonymous editorial content. Chefchaouen v2 should find named replacements.

primary_en.notes: Legacy institutional — major Toronto magazine. High authority. Named author required.
Independent alt-weekly. Good neighbourhood and Caribbean coverage — added 7 restaurants in supplementary run. Named author required.
Independent food blogger. Good Italian Toronto coverage. Added in supplementary run.
⚠ Concentration risk — contributed 53% of Toronto pack in v1 run. Apply strict 30% cap. High quality but dominates if unchecked.
Legacy institutional. May be paywalled — try direct article URL.
Secondary. Good for cross-validation and new openings coverage.
Independent EN resident food writer. Seville-based. 2025 article. Best independent EN voice in the pack — no COI. High priority for future runs.

⚠ COI: Lauren Aloise is co-founder of Devour Tours, a commercial food tour operator in Seville. Treat as secondary. Entries carry ⚠ coi flag. Genuine local knowledge but commercial conflict must be disclosed. Cap at 30% of EN pool.
Independent food writing platform. Seville coverage by named writers. Not used in v6 run — worth attempting in v2.

primary_es.notes: Best ES local source in the pack. Pepe Monforte is a local food awards panel judge. 4 articles used in v6 run (2023-2026). High yield, strong local knowledge, covers all neighbourhoods including outer areas (Pino Montano, Nervión). Apply concentration cap — 4 articles risks over-representation.

Confirmed local ES publication writing for Seville residents not tourists. Previously found 72% non-overlap with EN sources. 2 articles used in v6 run. High priority — always include as Phase 0 direct fetch.
ES independent journalism platform. Named writer. Used in v6 run. Good quality.

primary_fr_or_other.notes: ES-language National Geographic travel section. Named writer. Secondary source — national publication not Seville-specific. Good for cross-validation.

known_problematic.reason: Commercial tour operator. COI — treat as secondary, cap at 20 restaurants, flag ⚠ coi. Co-founded by Lauren Aloise (Spanish Sabores).
Major regional newspaper. Not used in v6 run — worth attempting in v2 with named writer search.
Local Seville newspaper. Not used in v6 run — worth attempting in v2.

outstanding_v2: Find second independent EN Seville resident food writer — reduces COI concentration in EN pool
21 open_status_check restaurants need closure verification before sharing widely
Attempt ABC de Sevilla and El Correo de Andalucía with named writer searches

primary_en.notes: Independent EN fine dining critic. Global coverage, deep research. 2024 article used in v6 run. High quality, slightly skews fine dining.
Independent EN travel and food writer, Spain-based. 2025 article. Good neighbourhood coverage.
Independent EN food and travel writer, Spain-based. 2026 article. Solid local knowledge.
EN secondary source. Named writer. 2024 article. Good coverage but treat as secondary.

primary_es.notes: Best ES local source for Córdoba. Local news site food section, two articles used in v6 (Juan Velasco 2025-11-26, Alfonso Alba 2025-11-25). High yield, genuinely local voice. Priority source for v2.
Local Córdoba newspaper food section. Named writer. 2026 article used in v6.
ES independent journalism platform. Named writer. 2023 article used in v6. Good quality but older content.
ES food and travel blog, named writer. 2024 article used in v6.

known_problematic.reason: Confirmed: covers Cádiz and Sevilla provinces ONLY. No Córdoba section exists. Do not attempt.
Fetched in v6 Phase 0 but article date was 2022 — outside content window. Retry in v2 with fresh URL.

outstanding_v2: Attempt ABC de Córdoba (abccordoba.es) with named writer search
Attempt El Día de Córdoba (eldiadecordoba.es) with named writer search
Retry Guía Repsol with 2025-2026 article URL

primary_en.notes: Independent EN food and travel writer. 2025 article used in v6. Good quality.
⚠ COI: Lauren Aloise is co-founder of Devour Tours, a commercial food tour operator. Treat as secondary. 2023 article used in v6. Cap at 30% of EN pool.
EN secondary source. Named writer. 2025 article used in v6.
Confirmed absent — no Granada coverage exists on this platform as of v6 run.

primary_es.notes: Best ES local source for Granada. Alfonso Campos is a 25-year-old Granada-trained food critic backed by the Ayuntamiento. Column launched April 2025 — only 2 articles published at time of v6 run. Archive grows weekly. HIGH PRIORITY for v2 in 2-3 months. Direct fetch.

known_problematic.reason: Confirmed: does not cover Granada. Cádiz and Sevilla only.

outstanding_v2: Wait 2-3 months for El Gocho Gourmet archive to grow (6+ articles needed)
Search for additional independent ES Granada food writers
5 open_status_check restaurants need closure verification (Spanish Sabores 2023 source)

primary_en.notes: Used in v5 run. Independent EN food writing platform with Rabat coverage.

primary_fr.notes: French-language Moroccan press. Worth attempting for FR food coverage in v2.

known_problematic.reason: Arabic-language Rabat food writing pipeline has not yet found reliable named sources. Structural gap — same as Fes and Marrakesh.

outstanding_v2: Find additional EN and FR named food writers covering Rabat
Attempt Arabic-language sources directly via Jina
